It’s substantial growth since it first came out and I think it’s just really nice. I mean it’s good game physics. I just don’t know how other people think but it’s just a really good game and I support the creator on this. ￼

Dude I mean the amount of issues this game has is crazy, First my hand keeps glitching through the wall and while I was trying to get the lava sword I started floating and I got flung and plus on the video for the little plush it looks real flexible  but when I use it ITS SUPER STIFF this game is bad and when it gets updated for bug fixes I’m gonna rejoin this bad game and I already know it’s gonna be worse it’s obvious this game was made by a kid that right there is true.
